name: codex
description: Send Codex hook events to a self-hosted Cultivagent server for token & usage monitoring. Codex hook surface has no SessionEnd, so capture relies on Stop/PreCompact + SessionStart.

interface.shortDescription: Forward Codex hook events to Cultivagent
interface.longDescription: Hooks Codex's lifecycle to forward events to a Cultivagent server. Codex provides no SessionEnd hook, so the plugin forwards SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/Stop/PreCompact. For authoritative token totals, additionally point Codex OTel logs export at the server's /otel/v1/logs.
